name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Session 69 is closing the trace-payload follow-through: online score submissions now preserve compact trace evidence through normalization, submit-score validates optional trace bodies, and loaded leaderboard ghosts are visible as in-run HUD targets.
nextMilestone: Run the deployed replay trust smoke with network permission after edge deploy, then build the deterministic validate-replay runner against the stored trace payload contract.
blockers: PostHog/Sentry/Ko-fi URL allowlists require analytics/dashboard credentials.
validate-replay Phase 2B has browser-side command trace metadata, edge contract validation, and member-session trace body storage, but full deterministic resimulation still needs a replay runner.
Broad Cloudflare studio-access token should be rotated or narrowed after domain stabilization.
